cases.name: nondeterministic_counter
cases.description: Function returns incrementing counter byte — must fail with DeterminismViolation

cases.name: empty_output_rejected
cases.description: Function returns empty Vec — must fail with EmptyOutput unless allow_empty

cases.name: empty_output_allowed
cases.description: Function returns empty Vec with verify_allow_empty — must pass

cases.name: codec_uint_42
cases.description: encode(&Value::UInt(42)) — canonical encoder must be deterministic

cases.name: sha3_256_abc
cases.note: Verified by verifier_with_digest_output and digest_algorithms_are_deterministic tests

cases.name: audit_log_timestamps_monotonic
cases.description: Two sequential verifications produce monotonically increasing VirtualTime timestamps
